titleStmt.title: SII 26.674: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 674. (A.R. No. 632 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North, west and south walls of the same shrine.
This inscription is built in the middle and at the bottom. It is in Tamil and Grantha characters.

It refers to the setting up of an image of the god Kshēttirapālar in the temple of the god Tirunallamuḍaiya-mahādēvar of Tirunal[l]am, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, by the queen Arindavan Mahādēviyār. It seems to be a gift of land for worship to the same deity by the queen who had purchased it in the 16th year (1027-28 A.D.) (of the king's reign) from a Brāhmaṇa woman named Veṇṇaiyan Naṅgai Muttāḷi-śāni, the wife of Kaviṇiyan Nārāyaṇan Nakkapirān Sōmayājiyār of the same place. It seems that the sabhai of the same place (i.e., Tirunallam) agreed for the sale of the land for a sum of 128 (?) kāśu. Other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉnivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum porcceyappāvaiyuñ cirttani teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiyallūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭun tuṭarva(ā)ṉa
velippaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porutaṭar Īḻattaraiyartamuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭi
yum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intiraṉāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar puka
ḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tolperuṅkāval palapaḻantivum ceruvil ciṉavil Irupattoru kālaraicukaḷaik kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cānti timattivvaraṇ karuti
pālaṉaivemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟu colaittaṇṭa puttiyumiraṇacūraṉai muraṇuṟattākkit tikka kkaṇalāṭamum kovintacantaṉ mā
koppuṟu niṟai maṇal māpappāḷamum kāvaliṉ puricai me ṅkamum viḷaippaintūṟuṭai vaḷaip� ṟum talaittakkor pukaḻ lattakkolamum tita
Iraṭṭappāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanitikkulapperumalaikaḷum vikkira (vikkirama)virac cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirvaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamuṅ kāḻiṭaivaḷar nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñcilai virapañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaipaḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirttiyāti nakaravaiyil cantiran tolkulat tintitaraṉai viṉaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉakkukaiyum kiṭṭarum ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurar cer nalak kocalaināṭum tanma
vittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭal Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalarttirt teṟipuṉalk kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷp palakalañ celuttic caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅka panmanā vāriyam porukaṭal kariyoṭum Akappaṭutturimaiyi ṟakkiya perunitip piṟakkamum Ārttavan kanakapporttoḻil vācalil viccātiratoraṇamum mottoḷir puṉamaṇipputavamum kaṉamaṇikkatavum niṟaiciṟavicaiyamum tuṟainir paṇṇaiyum vana malaiyūreyiṟṟonmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalcūḻ māyiriṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāvil
mum māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrā- jentracoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 7 Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunalattu sabhaiyom tirunallamuṭaiya mahādevar śrīkoyilil nampirāṭṭiyār Arin=tavan mahādeviyār Eḻun=taruḷu[*]vitta tirumeni kṣettirapālatevar tirunāmattāl Ivvūrk kaviṇiyan nārāyaṇan nakkapirān somayājiyār brāhmaṇi veṇṇaiyan naṅkai muttāḷicāni pakkam nampirāṭṭiyār Arintavan mahādeviyār yāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu vilai
nilam śaṇḍeśvaravatikku kiḻakku cantiracekaravāykkālu
kku vaṭakku Itaṉ kiḻaic catiravaṟutikku meṟkum kiḻakkum nilam
Eṅkaḷūr sabhā vyavasthaippaṭi nūṟṟirupatteṭṭu ka
Digital edition of SII 26.674 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
